title: Children of Lathandar
bodyText:
Descendants of Lathander and Leliana — the bloodline that throws **Aasimar** every few generations (white/grey eyes, later wings, gold-flecked blood). Once a faith community; **half walked away when it curdled cultish** (exclusive-worship demands). **Lily Spells** is a member of the gentler tradition.

> [!dm] **Alaric**: an Aasimar who, during the calamity, falsely claimed he could summon Lathander's help — and when Lathander vanished into the pool, convinced the fanatics **he IS Lathander**. Their worship ascended him to **demigod**: he now grants celestial warlock/paladin/cleric powers that *resemble* Lathander's light but aren't pure. Prime suspect as **Eleanora's patron**. The pretender-vs-the-real-body (Eddy) collision is a loaded gun.
